# c43 pool/GMP leak-scan baseline
# Known findings on upstream master, generated by scripts/test/run-leakscan.sh.
# The gate (scripts/test/run-leakscan.sh) fails on any finding NOT listed here.
# Format: <mode> <kind> <identifier>
#
# Re-verified against upstream master d1b643e7a: item-keyed, so no line drift;
# every entry still reproduces, zero new. Still current at 7d4308229: the merge
# since d1b643e7a is test-only, and the item sweep and keyscan sequences are
# corpus-independent, so this set is unchanged. keyscan integrate_pgm_x20 still crashes
# (see __DEV/reports/REPORT-13-CI-LANES.md - a findKey2ndParam out-of-bounds read
# plus unbounded integrator recursion).
#
# Triage (see __DEV/reports/REPORT-4-BUGS.md):
# - leakscan LEAK item=1202/1203/1465/1889 - persistent state
# (named vars / equations / refresh), not orphan leaks.
# - CRASH item=... - handlers called out of keyboard/menu context.
# - keyscan CRASH seq=integrate_pgm_x20 - REAL SIGSEGV, reproduced on upstream
# bfbcaf7d7 (build.leakscan, testSuite --keyscan): the integrator key sequence
# (kInteg x20) segfaults. Surfaced by the "RS and EXIT interrupt of solve,
# integrate, plot" rework (1cc97e595 and fixups). Tracked here pending a
# root-cause and a c43 fix branch; not a scanner out-of-context artifact.
# Removed 2026-07-09, fixed upstream in the 167-commit sync to bfbcaf7d7:
# leakscan LEAK item=1645 (fnXToAlphaOld, MR !1428 merged), item=2412, item=2413,
# and keyscan LEAK seq=equation_x80.
# Remove a line here only when the underlying finding is fixed upstream.
